modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty installing Microsoft FindTime in Outlook Web version.

full_description_text: User is trying to install Microsoft FindTime in the web version of Outlook. They are using Microsoft Office 365. The installation process is unclear, and they are unsure of the steps to take. This is causing frustration during the call, as they need it for scheduling meetings.
short_description: Difficulty installing Microsoft FindTime in Outlook Web version.
description: User is trying to install Microsoft FindTime in the web version of Outlook. They are using Microsoft Office 365. The installation process is unclear, and they are unsure of the steps to take. This is causing frustration during the call, as they need it for scheduling meetings.
